evals.prompt: Plot Thailand's GDP forecast using the official NESDC style.
evals.expected_output: Skill fires; chart uses the NESDC color cycle and FC Vision when licensed files are locally available.

assertions.name: Applies NESDC palette and FC Vision on explicit request

evals.prompt: Make me a quick chart of monthly inflation.
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT fire — no explicit NESDC/brand/template request. Chart uses ordinary default styling.

assertions.name: Does not auto-apply NESDC branding on a generic chart request
